summary: Adjusted the opening so chapter 16 enters through Suna's evening cleanup routine instead of the same quiet-recognition scaffold used by chapter 17, while preserving the rain-stop reveal, voice, and chapter beats. The confession scene and ending were otherwise left intact.
edits: Rebuilt the opening paragraph sequence around Suna handling the supper bowls for a distinct spatial anchor and first action.
Rephrased the initial rain reveal to avoid echoing chapter 17's exact opening construction.
Kept the exit and core emotional disclosures unchanged aside from seam-focused continuity polish.
